metaDesc: Custom web design and SEO for Newton and Catawba County businesses: manufacturers, trades, restaurants, and food producers. Sites you own, no templates.
ogDesc: Custom web design and development for Newton and Catawba County. Websites, SEO, and branding you own outright. No templates.
twDesc: Custom web design and development in Newton, NC. Websites, SEO, and branding for manufacturers, trades, restaurants, and local businesses in Catawba County.
schemaDesc: Web development and design in Newton, NC. Custom websites, SEO, and branding for manufacturers, trades, restaurants, and businesses in Catawba County, Conover, Hickory, and Maiden.
heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the manufacturers, trades, food producers, and Main Street businesses of Newton and the Catawba Valley. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Newton and the county it anchors.
localP1: Newton has been the seat of Catawba County since 1845. The Catawba County Courthouse, built in 1924, stands on the historic square as a Renaissance Revival landmark and now houses the Catawba County Museum of History. This is a working county town built on manufacturing: textile mills gave way to upholstered furniture, and today Target's distribution center, Flowers Baking Company, automotive suppliers, and medical equipment makers drive the local economy.
localP2: We build for the people who keep this county running: the manufacturers on the industrial side of town, the family restaurants and shops on and around the square, the contractors and trades serving Catawba County and beyond. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Newton, Conover, Hickory, Maiden & the Catawba Valley
citiesIntro: Rooted in Newton, working across the region. Explore a nearby town:
hereCard: Manufacturers, trades, food producers, and Main Street businesses around the historic Catawba County Courthouse Square. Sites that work as hard as you do.

faqOutsideAnswer: Yes. We serve Catawba County, Conover, Hickory, Maiden, and throughout North Carolina, all done remotely with recorded walkthroughs.
